message:
feat(phase2c): update reliability/security policy artifacts for FT-P2C-008 coverage

Extend Phase-2C policy and gate infrastructure to incorporate FT-P2C-008
(NN state contract) alongside the existing FT-P2C-003 and FT-P2C-007
deferred coverage targets.

HARDENED_DEVIATION_ALLOWLIST_V1.json:
- Add FT-P2C-008 allowlist entry permitting hardened mode to continue
  load_state_dict when only missing/unexpected keys are present and no
  incompatible shapes are detected (nn_state.non_strict_missing_unexpected),
  with constraints requiring empty incompatible_shapes and deterministic
  missing/unexpected key telemetry

RELIABILITY_BUDGET_POLICY_V1.json:
- Reorder coverage floors to sequential packet numbering (FT-P2C-004
  now precedes FT-P2C-005)
- Add deferred coverage targets for FT-P2C-003, FT-P2C-007, and
  FT-P2C-008 with activation conditions gated on packet scenario
  aggregation into e2e_matrix_full_v1.jsonl
- Add G1..G8 gate topology map defining the full gate chain from
  fmt/lint through readiness sign-off

RELIABILITY_GATE_WORKFLOW_V1.md:
- Expand gate inputs to include per-packet forensic log streams
  (ft-p2c-003, ft-p2c-007, ft-p2c-008)
- Replace single gate execution section with full G1..G8 gate topology
  table documenting contracts, primary commands, and blocking evidence
  artifacts for each gate
- Update failure forensics output shape to require gate ID, deterministic
  replay commands, artifact_refs, and reason_code

SECURITY_COMPATIBILITY_THREAT_MATRIX_V1.md:
- Extend scope to include FT-P2C-008
- Add threat row for nn module/state contract drift and malformed state
  payload handling with fail-closed posture and bounded hardened allowlist
- Update cross-references to include FT-P2C-008 threat model artifact

UNIT_E2E_LOGGING_CROSSWALK_V1.json:
- Expand packet_scope for forensic triage behavior to include all packets
  (FT-P2C-001 through FT-P2C-008)
- Migrate all test and replay commands from bare cargo to rch-sandboxed
  execution with CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_phase2c isolation
- Add BHV-FT-007 (device-guard dispatch transitions) and BHV-FT-008
  (NN module/state contract parity) behavior entries with full
  unit/property, differential, and e2e coverage specifications

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

+    "g5": "perf_regression+isomorphism",

+    "g7": "raptorq_sidecar+decode_proof+integrity_scrub",
+    "g8": "readiness_signoff+residual_risk_audit"
+  },
   "flake_budget": {
     "max_flake_suspects": 0,
     "detection_rule": "same scenario_id appears with both pass and non-pass outcomes in one gate window",

@@ -1,26 +1,42 @@
 # Reliability Gate Workflow V1
 
-Bead: `bd-3v0.22`  
+Beads: `bd-3v0.10`, `bd-3v0.22`  
 Policy: `artifacts/phase2c/RELIABILITY_BUDGET_POLICY_V1.json`
 
 ## Goal
 
-Fail CI with precise, actionable diagnostics when reliability budgets are violated across coverage, pass ratio, or flake ceilings.
+Fail CI with precise, actionable diagnostics when Phase-2C reliability budgets or gate contracts are violated.
 
 ## Gate Inputs
 
-- E2E forensic log stream:
+- E2E forensic log streams:
   - `artifacts/phase2c/e2e_forensics/e2e_matrix_full_v1.jsonl`
+  - `artifacts/phase2c/e2e_forensics/ft-p2c-003.jsonl`
+  - `artifacts/phase2c/e2e_forensics/ft-p2c-007.jsonl`
+  - `artifacts/phase2c/e2e_forensics/ft-p2c-008.jsonl`
 - Reliability policy:
   - `artifacts/phase2c/RELIABILITY_BUDGET_POLICY_V1.json`
 - Optional index artifacts for triage handoff:
   - `artifacts/phase2c/e2e_forensics/crash_triage_full_v1.json`
   - `artifacts/phase2c/e2e_forensics/failure_forensics_index_v1.json`
 
-## Gate Execution
+## G1..G8 Gate Topology
 
-- Run checker:
-  - `cargo run -p ft-conformance --bin check_reliability_budgets -- --policy artifacts/phase2c/RELIABILITY_BUDGET_POLICY_V1.json --e2e artifacts/phase2c/e2e_forensics/e2e_matrix_full_v1.jsonl --output artifacts/phase2c/e2e_forensics/reliability_gate_report_v1.json`
+| Gate | Contract | Primary command(s) | Blocking evidence artifacts |
+|---|---|---|---|
+| `G1` | fmt/lint hygiene | `rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_phase2c cargo fmt --check` + `rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_phase2c cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings` | clippy/fmt output in CI logs |
+| `G2` | unit/property + structured log contract | `rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_phase2c cargo test --workspace` | packet `unit_property_quality_report_v1.json` + `UNIT_E2E_LOGGING_CROSSWALK_V1.json` |
+| `G3` | differential/metamorphic/adversarial parity | `rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_phase2c cargo run -p ft-conformance --bin run_differential_report -- --mode both --output artifacts/phase2c/conformance/differential_report_v1.json` | packet `differential_packet_report_v1.json` + reconciliation notes |
+| `G4` | e2e replay + forensics completeness | `rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_phase2c cargo run -p ft-conformance --bin run_e2e_matrix -- --mode both --output artifacts/phase2c/e2e_forensics/e2e_matrix_full_v1.jsonl` | packet `ft-p2c-*.jsonl`, crash triage, forensics index |
+| `G5` | perf tails + isomorphism | packet microbench tests under `ft-conformance` via `rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_phase2c cargo test -p ft-conformance packet_e2e_microbench_* -- --nocapture` | packet `optimization_delta_v1.json` + `optimization_isomorphism_v1.md` |
+| `G6` | artifact schema + packet lock validation | `rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_phase2c cargo run -p ft-conformance --bin validate_phase2c_artifacts -- /data/projects/frankentorch` | validator summary (`ok=true`), packet required artifacts present |
+| `G7` | RaptorQ decode/integrity durability | `rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_phase2c cargo run -p ft-conformance --bin run_raptorq_durability_pipeline` | `RAPTORQ_REPAIR_SYMBOL_MANIFEST_V1.json`, `RAPTORQ_INTEGRITY_SCRUB_REPORT_V1.json`, `RAPTORQ_DECODE_PROOF_EVENTS_V1.json` |
+| `G8` | readiness sign-off + residual risk | packet closure + readiness drill (`bd-3v0.11`) | readiness drill note, residual risk and allowlist deltas |
+
+## Reliability Budget Execution
+
+- Run reliability checker:
+  - `rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_phase2c cargo run -p ft-conformance --bin check_reliability_budgets -- --policy artifacts/phase2c/RELIABILITY_BUDGET_POLICY_V1.json --e2e artifacts/phase2c/e2e_forensics/e2e_matrix_full_v1.jsonl --output artifacts/phase2c/e2e_forensics/reliability_gate_report_v1.json`
 
 ## Budget Families
 
@@ -46,12 +62,13 @@ Quarantine and retry policy:
 - include `scenario_id`, `reason_code`, replay command, and artifact references in the bead update.
 - de-quarantine after 3 consecutive clean runs.
 
-## Required CI Output Shape
+## Required CI Failure Forensics Shape
 
-When budgets fail, report must include:
-- exact budget ID(s)
+When any gate fails, failure output must include:
+- exact gate ID (`G1`..`G8`) and budget ID(s)
 - failing packet/suite/scenario IDs
-- linked artifact refs (`e2e`, `crosswalk`, `forensics index`)
-- remediation hint from policy
+- deterministic replay command(s)
+- `artifact_refs` entries for e2e logs, differential slices, and forensics index
+- `reason_code` and remediation hint from policy
 
 This ensures no hidden manual steps are required for triage.

@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 # Security + Compatibility Threat Matrix v1
 
 Version: `security-compat-matrix-v1`  
-Scope: Phase-2C packet families (`FT-P2C-001`, `FT-P2C-002`, `FT-P2C-003`, `FT-P2C-004`, `FT-P2C-005`, `FT-P2C-006`, `FT-P2C-007`)
+Scope: Phase-2C packet families (`FT-P2C-001`, `FT-P2C-002`, `FT-P2C-003`, `FT-P2C-004`, `FT-P2C-005`, `FT-P2C-006`, `FT-P2C-007`, `FT-P2C-008`)
 
 ## Policy Core
 
@@ -34,6 +34,7 @@ Scope: Phase-2C packet families (`FT-P2C-001`, `FT-P2C-002`, `FT-P2C-003`, `FT-P
 | `FT-P2C-005` | CPU kernel first-wave semantics and packet projection drift | reject dtype/device mismatch, invalid keysets, and incompatible tensor-meta states | projected dispatch fallback only (`dispatch.composite_backend_fallback`); contiguous projection drift remains blocking until resolved |
 | `FT-P2C-006` | checkpoint parsing/recovery | unknown field/version/hash mismatch fails closed | bounded malformed diagnostic context only (`serialization.bounded_malformed_diagnostic`); no incompatible acceptance |
 | `FT-P2C-007` | device guards and backend transitions | reject cross-device operations, unknown key paths, and incompatible backend transitions | bounded composite fallback (`dispatch.composite_backend_fallback`) with strict fail-closed behavior for unknown keys and incompatible device/dtype transitions |
+| `FT-P2C-008` | nn module/state contract drift and malformed state payload handling | reject invalid registration names, missing/unexpected key mismatches, incompatible shapes, and assign-path drift with deterministic structured evidence | bounded hardened allowlist for non-strict missing/unexpected key handling (`nn_state.non_strict_missing_unexpected`) while incompatible-shape and assign-path checks remain fail-closed |
 
 ## Drift Gates
 
@@ -46,5 +47,5 @@ Scope: Phase-2C packet families (`FT-P2C-001`, `FT-P2C-002`, `FT-P2C-003`, `FT-P
 
 - `artifacts/phase2c/HARDENED_DEVIATION_ALLOWLIST_V1.json`
 - packet `risk_note.md` files with compatibility/security mitigations
-- packet threat-model artifacts for active packet C tasks (current: `artifacts/phase2c/FT-P2C-007/threat_model.md`)
+- packet threat-model artifacts for active packet C tasks (current: `artifacts/phase2c/FT-P2C-007/threat_model.md`, `artifacts/phase2c/FT-P2C-008/threat_model.md`)
 - packet parity sidecars and decode proofs

+          "rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target_phase2c cargo run -p ft-conformance --bin build_failure_forensics_index -- --e2e artifacts/phase2c/e2e_forensics/e2e_matrix_full_v1.jsonl --triage artifacts/phase2c/e2e_forensics/crash_triage_full_v1.json --output artifacts/phase2c/e2e_forensics/failure_forensics_index_v1.json"
         ],

       "coverage_status": "covered"

+      "behavior_id": "BHV-FT-007",
+      "name": "Device-guard dispatch transitions + fail-closed backend routing",

   ],
   "coverage_gaps": [
